summary.text: Customers find these shoes to be good quality products that are very comfortable with great cushion while walking. The shoes fit well true to size and are good for wide feet. They also appreciate the appearance, describing them as very beautiful. Customers are happy with the weight of the shoes, though they have mixed opinions on durability.
